flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Cedar Crest College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (857 vs 1.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cedar Crest College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 834).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cedar Crest College rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($23.8k → $28.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cedar Crest College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
